query:
ALTER TABLE design_submissions 
ADD COLUMN design_scope ENUM('laws_collective', 'house', 'business') DEFAULT 'house' AFTER category,
ADD COLUMN is_original_design BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE AFTER design_scope,
ADD COLUMN is_logo_design BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE AFTER is_original_design,
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approval ENUM('not_required', 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'not_required' AFTER is_logo_design,
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approver_id INT NULL AFTER founding_house_approval,
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approval_date BIGINT NULL AFTER founding_house_approver_id,
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approval_notes TEXT NULL AFTER founding_house_approval_date;
